text: We asked 200 students what makes campus news feel trustworthy. Short answer: clear sources and no clickbait. Swipe for the top five responses and tell us what we missed. #CampusMedia #StudentVoices

Starting Monday, the Riverside night shuttle will run every 20 minutes during exam week. Students can board with campus ID. Full stops and hours here: riv.city/shuttle. Share this with anyone leaving the library late.
今晚 8 点直播，我们会邀请两位社区记者讨论“谁有权定义城市更新的故事”。欢迎留言提问，也可以转发给正在做新闻传播课程项目的同学。#城市传播#
今天拍了一个三分钟短视频，聊聊为什么品牌道歉声明常常让人更生气。你更在意速度、诚意，还是后续整改？评论区见。

New café menu launches tomorrow. We tested lower-cost lunch sets after hearing students wanted quicker and cheaper options between classes. Tag a friend who always skips lunch for deadlines and come try the pilot menu.
